zh: 你能弹吉他吗？
en: Can you play guitar?

zh: 你有什么问题？
en: What questions do you have?

zh: 你几点去上学？
en: What time do you go to school?

zh: 我通常早上六点半起床。
en: I usually get up at six thirty.

zh: 里克几点吃早餐？
en: What time does Rick eat breakfast?

zh: 我们想加入国际象棋俱乐部。
en: We want to join the chess club.

zh: 不要在教室里跑。
en: Dont run in the classroom.

zh: 那真是早餐的糟糕时机！
en: Thats a funny time for breakfast!

zh: 他们通常在晚上七点四十五吃晚饭。
en: They usually eat dinner at a quarter to seven in the evening.

zh: 孩子们，该吃饭了。
en: Time for dinner, children.

zh: 早睡早起对我们的健康有益。
en: Its good for our health to go to bed early and get up early.

zh: 要么你现在离开，要么我报警！
en: Either you leave now or I'll call the police!

zh: 她知道这对她不好，但味道很好。
en: She knows its not good for her, but it tastes good.

zh: 你可以今天或者明天来。
en: You can come either today or tomorrow.

zh: 里克通常早上六点半起床。
en: Rick usually gets up at six thirty.

zh: 我早上六点四十分刷牙洗澡。
en: Ibrush my teeth and take a shower at six forty.

zh: 花他大约五分钟时间从他家走到地铁站。
en: It takes him about five minutes to walk to the subway station from his home.

zh: 多久到学校？
en: How long does it take you to get to school?

zh: 地铁列车填满了地铁站。
en: The subway train fills the subway station.

zh: 通常我乘坐公交车大约十分钟才能到达那里。
en: It usually takes me about ten minutes to get there by bus.

zh: 你可以乘坐地铁列车。
en: You can take the subway train by subway.

zh: 那个小山村里没有电脑。
en: There are no computers in that small mountain village.

zh: 河流流入大海。
en: The river runs into the sea.

zh: 汤姆首先在五点半洗澡。
en: Tom takes a shower first at five thirty.

zh: 他去学校走路。
en: He walks to school.

zh: 你明天必须来。
en: You must come tomorrow.

zh: 她一定有这本书。
en: She must have this book.

zh: 我们必须准时上学。
en: We must get to school on time.

zh: 飞机和火车不总是准时到达。
en: Planes and trains dont always arrive on time.

zh: 孩子们，你不能吵闹。
en: You mustn't be noisy, children.

zh: 在这个时间，孩子们在学校。
en: At this time of the day, children are at school.

zh: 请把书放在你的桌子上。
en: Please leave the book on your desk.

zh: 我晚餐后也无法放松。
en: After dinner, I cant relax either.

zh: 我的父亲说不了英语。
en: My father cant speak English.

zh: 你喜欢英语。我也喜欢。
en: You like English. I like it, too.

zh: 我的母亲也说不了，也不行。
en: My mother cant speak it, either.

zh: 我正在和家人一起看电视。
en: Im watching TV with my family.

zh: 很高兴能和大家一起度过时光。
en: Its nice to spend time together.

zh: 你想和我一起喝杯咖啡吗？
en: Do you want to join me for a cup of coffee?

zh: 我很想和你一起去看演出。
en: Id love to go to the show with you.

zh: 今天任何一天都可以。
en: Any day from today would be great.

zh: 我要去镇上，你想和我一起去吗？
en: Im going to town, would you like to join me?

zh: 很抱歉，恐怕我不能，因为我还有很多作业要做。
en: Sorry, Im afraid I cant because I still have lots of homework.

zh: 他是比赛中年纪最小的游泳运动员。
en: Hes the youngest swimmer in the race.

zh: 不要太骄傲，这里还有其他的小男孩也能玩这个游戏。
en: Dont be so proud, any other boy here can play this game.

zh: 任何其他家庭作为寄宿家庭的夜晚都是一次美好的经历。
en: Any other night for a host family is a wonderful experience.

zh: 对于朱辉和他的寄宿家庭来说，这就像任何其他夜晚一样。
en: Its like any other night for Zhu Hui and his host family.

zh: 他现在看起来没事了。
en: It sounds like hes all right now.

zh: 听起来你旅行很愉快。
en: It sounds like you had a good time on your trip.

zh: 我可以替他接留言吗？
en: Can I take a message for him?

zh: 你能请他回电吗？
en: Could you just tell him to call me back?

zh: 现在钟坏了。
en: The clock isnt working now.

zh: 我的朋友汤姆经常给我写信。
en: My friend, Tom, often writes to me.

zh: 你所在国家现在很热吧？
en: Its hot in your country now, isnt it?

zh: 那里现在非常冷吧？
en: It is very cold there, isnt it?

zh: 我能帮你什么吗？
en: How can I help you?

zh: 我刚到镇上。
en: Im new in town.

zh: 要到达那里，我通常走出去然后在桥路右转。
en: To get there, I usually walk out and turn right on Bridge Road.

zh: 我能为你做些什么？
en: What can I do for you?

zh: 这里非常安静，我喜欢在那里看书。
en: It is very quiet and I enjoy reading there.

zh: 你可以带这本书走，它是免费的！
en: You can take this book with you its free!

zh: 你明天有空吗？
en: Are you free tomorrow?

zh: 桥街上有什么餐厅吗？
en: Is there a restaurant on Bridge Street?

zh: 长街上有一家。
en: There is one on Long Street.

zh: 他矮小，留着短发。
en: Hes short and has short hair.

zh: 她非常高而且非常瘦。
en: Shes really tall and really thin.

zh: 我们七点见面吧，对吗？
en: Were meeting at seven, right?

zh: 他真的很英俊。
en: And hes really handsome.

zh: 谁是正在跟鲍勃说话的漂亮金发女郎？
en: Whos the beautiful blonde talking to Bob?

zh: 很多人不总是以同样的方式看待事物，所以他们可能会用不同的方式描述同一个人。
en: Many people dont always see things the same way so they may describe the same person differently.

zh: 他是个非常好的人。
en: He's a very nice person.

zh: 周末公园里有很多人在那里。
en: There are a lot of people in the park on the weekend.

zh: 另外，他们也不总是记得清楚。
en: Also, they dont always remember well.

zh: 冯先生的课很有意思。而且，他让大家很容易理解。
en: Mr. Fengs class is interesting. Also, he makes it easy to understand.

zh: 简的哥哥十二岁。她的姐姐也十二岁。他们是双胞胎。
en: Janes brother is twelve. Her sister is also twelve. They are twins.

zh: 我的父亲会说英语，他也会说法语。
en: My father can speak English, He can also speak French.

zh: 你想要什么？
en: What would you like?

zh: 我想来一杯加奶的黑茶，请。
en: Td like a cup of black tea with milk, please.

zh: 孩子们，你今天想吃什么？
en: What do you want to eat today, children?

zh: 如果他或她一次把所有的蜡烛都吹灭，愿望就会实现。
en: If he or she blows out all the candles in one go, the wish will come true.

zh: 你不能一次把所有的工作都做完。
en: You cant do the work all at one go.

zh: 许个愿，它真的可能实现。
en: Make a wish, and it can really come true.

zh: 所有的生日食物可能都不一样，但它们都很好吃。
en: All of these birthday foods may be different, but they are all delicious.

zh: 医生总是说吃油腻的食物是不健康的生活习惯。
en: Doctors always say eating fatty foods is an unhealthy habit.

zh: 他可能会来，也可能不会来。
en: He may come, or he may not.

zh: 我可能会迟到，所以不要等我。
en: I may be late, so dont wait for me.

zh: 总而言之，那天很精彩。
en: All in all, it was an exciting day.

zh: 我一点也不喜欢那次旅行。
en: I didnt like the trip at all.

zh: 看看那只鸟。多漂亮！
en: Look at that bird. How beautiful!

zh: 大约五小时前，我们在火车上离开了北京，但现在我们已经到达上海了！真快！
en: Some five hours ago we left Beijing on this train, but now we're arriving in Shanghai! How fast!
